LanguageData.AtePuls.stages.ate_wheat_porridge.label: ate wheat porridge
LanguageData.AtePuls.stages.ate_wheat_porridge.descri: It fills the stomach, but the texture is rough and the taste is bland.
LanguageData.AteMilitarisBread.stages.ate_military_br: This bread is dry and hard. Useful for travel, unpleasant for daily meals.
So soft and fragrant. It feels like my teeth are in heaven.
